title: Henckelia reticulosa
taxonomy: Henckelia reticulosa is classified within the plant family Gesneriaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet family. This family comprises over 3,000 species, including both annuals and perennials. Within the Gesneriaceae family, Henckelia reticulosa is further classified as a member of the subfamily Didymocarpoideae. The species is native to tropical regions and is often grown as an ornamental plant for its attractive foliage and vibrant flowers. Henckelia reticulosa is native to Southeast Asia and is often cultivated in greenhouses and indoor gardens.
